title: Siri Hustvedt - Dance Around the Self
original_title: Siri Hustvedt – Dance Around the Self
overview: Sabine Lidl presents Siri Hustvedt’s journey from her first novel to being a leading voice in contemporary literature – a film about feminist perspectives, Hustvedt’s soulmate Paul Auster, and the power of thought.
